description: Use this API to change the value of a Model Description of a load component model at a specified load or subsystem). This API routine was first introduced in release 35.5. ierr = change_ldmodc_cdesc(ibus, ltypname,id, name, mcomp, desc)
python_syntax: ierr = change_ldmodc_cdesc(ibus, ltypname,id, name, mcomp, desc)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus, owner, zone or area number. ignored when an all type load model is specified (unless an all type load model is specified). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ltypname
parameters.description: Load type, or “ “ if the model is not applied to applied to “load type”subsystem. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Load identifier, or “*” if the model is applied to all loads in the subsystem. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: mcomp
parameters.description: Model individual component number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: desc
parameters.description: Component model description. (input; blank by default).

error_codes.description: model NAME is not a load component model.
no <subsystem type> type <load type> model for load at <subsystem type> IBUS load id ID Component number Mcomp.
no All type <load type> model for load id ID Component number Mcomp.
<subsystem type> <load type> model for this id for <subsystem type> IBUS component number Mcomp is aaa not xxx.
all type <load type> model for this id component number Mcomp is aaa not xxx.
Model <NAME> applied to load <subsystem type> IBUS load id <ID> is a <load type> model; component description does not apply to this model type.
Model <NAME> applied to load id <ID> is a <load type> model; component description does not apply to this model type.
invalid Component number Mcomp for <load type> Model <NAME> for <subsystem> IBUS, load id <ID>
invalid Component number Mcomp for <load type> Model <NAME> for <subsystem type> IBUS, load id <ID>
